security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be tampered with during transmission.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not have adequate protections against tampering with vote data in transit.

assumptions: The communication channel between the user and the governance contract is not secured.
An attacker can intercept and modify vote messages before they reach the contract.

mitigation.strategy: Implement message encryption and integrity checks.

description: An attacker may tamper with the vote data during transmission, causing the governance contract to record an incorrect vote.

security_gap.gap_description: The system lacks mechanisms to prevent users from denying their votes.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not provide any mechanisms for verifiable vote casting and confirmation.

assumptions: The voting system does not provide a verifiable audit trail of user actions.
The system does not implement any measures to prevent vote repudiation.

mitigation.strategy: Implement a verifiable audit trail and confirmation mechanism for votes.

description: A user may cast a vote and later deny having done so, potentially undermining the integrity of the governance process.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote information may be revealed to unauthorized parties.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not protect the confidentiality of votes.

assumptions: Vote data is transmitted over an insecure channel.
The governance contract does not adequately protect vote information from unauthorized access.

mitigation.strategy: Implement data encryption and access controls.

description: An attacker may intercept and retrieve vote information, compromising the privacy of voters.
